trigger.stage: first v2 receptor-preparation case; before common-box admission or any Vina execution
trigger.finding: Meeko template matching failed because TYR35 lacks seven side-chain heavy atoms, ARG220 lacks six, and LYS267 lacks four. TYR35 is adjacent to the frozen binding pocket.
trigger.consequence: Deleting the three residues with allow_bad_res would introduce a receptor-preparation artifact, so the v2 selection is inadmissible for docking.

scope: Retain every amendment01 rule and additionally exclude a coordinate candidate when any present standard amino-acid residue lacks a heavy atom required by its standard residue template. Do not rebuild residues, use allow_bad_res, or substitute a receptor manually.
decision: Run a separately versioned v3 coordinate selection across the complete metadata-eligible pool before attempting receptor preparation again.
